title: Specialised Committee on Participation in Union Programmes Provisional Agenda 15 December 2025
body: "Provisional Agenda for the meetings of the Specialised Committee on Participation in Union Programmes (SCPUP) established by the UK-EU Trade and Cooperation Agreement. The SCPUP is a joint forum between the UK and the EU to address matters relating to participation in Union programmes as covered by Part Five of the Trade and Cooperation Agreement. The provisional agendas are formally adopted by Co-Chairs from the European Union Commission and the United Kingdom during the meeting. "
